summary: The diff implements a comprehensive AI-powered recruitment management platform with a Motoko backend and React frontend. Most requirements are covered, but several specific acceptance criteria have gaps. The Settings page navigation item is missing from the sidebar nav array. The Interviews page calendar view and the Pipeline page drag-and-drop functionality could not be confirmed from the truncated diffs. The hireiq-icon.dim_64x64.png favicon usage for REQ-22 is not evidenced. The Dashboard 'interviews this week' metric card shows a hardcoded 0.

missing_requirements.requirement: Sidebar navigation must include a Settings section
missing_requirements.reason: The navItems array in Layout.tsx lists only 8 items (Dashboard, Jobs, Candidates, Pipeline, Interviews, Analytics, Templates, Offers) and does not include a Settings entry.

missing_requirements.requirement: Interviews page must display a calendar toggle view in addition to the list view
missing_requirements.reason: The Interviews page file is not included in the visible diff, so a calendar view implementation cannot be confirmed.

missing_requirements.requirement: Kanban Pipeline board must support drag-and-drop between columns to move candidates through stages
missing_requirements.reason: The Pipeline page file is not included in the visible diff, so drag-and-drop implementation cannot be confirmed.

missing_requirements.requirement: Dashboard metric card for total interviews this week must display real data fetched from backend
missing_requirements.reason: Dashboard.tsx hardcodes interviewsThisWeek = 0 with a comment indicating it is not actually fetched from backend data.

missing_requirements.requirement: Use the generated hireiq-icon.dim_64x64.png as the browser tab favicon
missing_requirements.reason: No evidence in the diff of favicon configuration referencing hireiq-icon.dim_64x64.png. The logo is used in the sidebar but favicon usage is not shown anywhere.

hallucinated_features.description: Profile setup modal with name, email, and role fields shown after login
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not specify a post-login profile setup flow. App.tsx includes a ProfileSetupModal component that was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: caffeine.ai branding and referral link in the login screen footer
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention any caffeine.ai branding or attribution links in the UI.
